normative_oracle.rule: Do not bless files captured from FAKE-08 or another independent runtime as goldens.

captures.method: Load the fixture in the SFX editor, then run EXPORT P8_AUDIO_SFX%D.WAV, or use the equivalent -export command-line form.
Run probes/audio_status.p8 in the official native runtime. The cart records audio with extcmd(audio_rec/audio_end) and writes status once per _update60 call.
captures.capture_command: pnpm capture:official-probe -- --licensed-official-runtime --runtime /path/to/pico8 --runtime-version 0.2.7 --cart tests/conformance/probes/audio_status.p8 --output captures/official/0.2.7/audio_status.json --artifact p8_audio_runtime.wav --artifact audio_status.csv

captures.method: Internal research capture only unless author permission permits redistribution.

artifacts_to_record: WAV container metadata and sample format
capture command or exact interactive procedure
comparison_layers: raw SFX/music bytes must match exactly
stat trace must match per logical update
PCM length and transition positions must match exactly before resampling
sample-level comparison is preferred; any tolerance must be justified by measured official-runtime variation
